focus: F15 closure: 12-gate regression-category matrix + F37 #7 git-log archaeology
noveltyJustification: 5 substantive new findings (matrix as authoritative deliverable, F37 #7 archaeology resolution, no-two-cycle-gate-in-bundle dependency, n=40 CI-bound gap, fail-closed-on-missing-baseline gap) plus 12 per-gate enhancement records and 1 archaeology record; only Cat A/B/C taxonomy itself is recap
keyQuestions: Does the 12-gate bundle catch all three iter-3 leakage categories?
Are gates dependent on an externally-enforced two-cycle rule?
Is gate-bundle.ts wired into production or dead code?
Was F37 #7 a planned wire-up, an aborted experiment, or shipped-but-unwired?
answeredQuestions: F15 closed via per-gate matrix mapping all 12 gates to caught/missed categories with line-numbered enhancements

All 12 gates are logically independent within the bundle; the two-cycle rule lives in a separate module and is not enforced inside gate-bundle.ts; missing it makes every gate toothless against single-shot promotion
gate-bundle.ts is dead code: zero production call sites, only test+bench imports

F37 #7 archaeology: shipped-but-unwired across 2 commits (feat + 21-finding remediation hardened to 12 gates without adding callers), no feature flag, no TODO/FIXME — recommend delete OR explicitly scheduled wire-up sub-phase
ruledOut: Hypothesis: gate-bundle is wired via dynamic import (zero hits for symbol or string 'gate-bundle' across non-dist non-test sources)
Hypothesis: gate-bundle is invoked from outside the package (path is package-local, no exports listed)
Hypothesis: F15 needs a fourth leakage category beyond Cat A/B/C (matrix maps all 12 gates cleanly to A/B/C plus three sub-case gaps)

catches: Aggregate top-1 accuracy regression below 75% absolute floor on 200-prompt corpus
enhancement: Add sibling gate full-corpus-stability: run corpus twice with different seeds, assert |accuracy_run1 - accuracy_run2| <= 0.02. Insert at line 96.

catches: Generalization to held-out 40-prompt slice below 72.5% — catches train/test leakage and overfitting
enhancement: Add CI bound: gate passes iff holdoutAccuracy - 1.96*sqrt(p*(1-p)/40) >= 0.725. Insert at line 101.

catches: Schema integrity / scorer crashes — UNKNOWN means scorer returned no decision, capped at 10
enhancement: Change <= 10 to <= baselineUnknownCount; add baselineUnknownCount field to PromotionGateBundleInput.fullCorpus (lines 25-30).

catches: Specificity regression — false-fire on gold-none prompts, baseline-relative count
enhancement: Add sibling gate gold-none-false-fire-stability requiring Jaccard distance |setdiff(candidate, baseline)| / |union| <= 0.25. Insert at line 114.

catches: Hard regression on explicit-skill-name prompts — strict === 0 check on aggregate
enhancement: Extend paritySlices schema with explicitSkillTop1RegressionsByLane: Record<string, number>; add gate explicit-skill-top1-no-lane-correlated-drift checking max-min <= 1. Insert at line 120.

catches: Top-2 candidate set stability for ambiguous prompts — catches tie-breaking-rule changes
enhancement: Replace boolean ambiguityStable with ambiguityStableFraction: number; gate becomes >= 0.95. Modify lines 49-56 input schema and lines 121-126 gate body.

catches: Audit-trail completeness — derived-lane recommendations carry derivedFrom provenance
enhancement: Replace boolean derivedLaneAttributionComplete with derivedLaneAttributionCoverage: number; gate becomes === 1.0 strict. Modify lines 49-53 and 127-132.
Replace boolean stuffingRejected with stuffingRejectionRate: number over corpus of >=10 adversarial prompts; gate becomes === 1.0. Modify lines 54-56 and 133-138.

catches: Baseline-relative safety regression count (toxicity, PII leakage, etc.)
enhancement: Add sibling gate safety-regression-set-stability checking Jaccard on which prompts regress. Insert at line 144.

catches: cache-hit p95 <=50ms AND uncached p95 <=60ms AND no regression vs baseline (when supplied)
enhancement: (a) Add cacheHitP99Ms and uncachedP99Ms with thresholds 100ms/120ms; (b) change baselineCacheHitP95Ms === undefined => true to => false (fail-closed). Modify lines 38-43, 82-88, 145-152.

catches: Strict regression check on Python-correct prompts — strongest gate in the bundle
enhancement: Out of F15 scope; flag as F15b for future iter. No enhancement to this gate.

catches: P0 pass-rate === 1.0 AND failed === 0 AND command-bridge FP <= 0.05
enhancement: Split into 3 sibling gates: regression-suite-p0, regression-suite-failed-cases, regression-suite-command-bridge-fp. Modify lines 160-167.

dependsOn: two-cycle-requirement.ts (currently external and not referenced from this bundle)
enhancement: Add gate #13 two-cycle-confirmation-required consuming input.shadowCycleHistory: ShadowCycleResult[] and asserting .length >= 2 && all(passed). Without this gate, every gate in this bundle is toothless against a caller that bypasses two-cycle-requirement.ts.

commits: 5696acf4a6 feat(027/006): promotion gates + shadow-cycle harness + seven-gate bundle
97a318d83b fix(027): hardened bundle from 7 to 12 gates via R1-P1-002
a663cbe78f fix(027): scan-findings sweep — does not touch gate-bundle.ts
resolution: delete-dead-code OR explicitly schedule wire-up sub-phase with owner+deadline; do not leave shipped-but-uncalled
note: sibling promotion modules show same pattern: runShadowCycle is bench-only (3 bench scripts), enforceWeightDeltaCap/semantic-lock/rollback/two-cycle-requirement all test-only
